# zoop — creative developer portfolio

This is the personal portfolio of zoop (zachy.cc), a creative developer specializing in real-time WebGL, GLSL shaders, and interactive motion design. 

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: Vanilla JS + HTML5, Three.js, GSAP (ScrollTrigger, SplitText, DrawSVGPlugin, Flip), Lenis (smooth scroll).
- Infrastructure: Cloudflare Pages & Workers, Cloudflare KV.

## Pages & Navigation
- `/` - Main application (the portfolio). Contains sections:
  - Hero (Raymarched physical backdrop/mesh, morphs on scroll).
  - Selected Work (Horizontal scroll gallery of featured projects).
  - About (Creative skills, vibe, achievements).
  - Play (Interactive GPU fluid/liquid-ink canvas).
  - Contact (Contact form & email).
- `/projects` - Complete index of all projects (copied dynamically from `/`).
- `/admin` - Password-protected site configuration editor (writes to Cloudflare KV).

## APIs
- `GET /api/config` - Public, returns the dynamic layout config JSON (theme, text copy, projects list).
- `POST /api/boop` - Increment the global boop counter.
- `GET /api/boop` - Returns the current total boop count.

## WebMCP Tools
This website exposes interactive client-side WebMCP tools to visiting AI agents (via the `document.modelContext` API):
- `boop_blob` - Increment the global boop counter and trigger a blob ripple.
- `trigger_chaos` - Enable "chaos mode" on the page (screen shake, graphics modifications).
- `barrel_roll` - Perform a 360-degree rotation of the website.
- `splash_fluid` - Trigger a random ink splash on the fluid simulation canvas.
- `get_portfolio_info` - Fetch the full dynamic JSON configuration (including all projects and contact details).
